reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question, and verified the agent responded with the correct answer "4" within the expected timeframe.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the home page showing "Your Agents" with two agents listed: QA-20260721-193059-oov4 (idle) and QA-20260721-193058-79zj (idle)
Step 2: Clicked on "QA-20260721-193058-79zj" agent in the sidebar - Successfully navigated to the agent's detail page with URL /agents/qa-20260721-193058-79zj-gfhaxs4459
Step 3: Verified agent status - Agent status confirmed as "idle" (shown in top-right corner), which meets the requirement of "running" or "idle"
Step 4: Clicked on message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully entered in the input field with placeholder text "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send"
Step 5: Clicked Send message button - Message successfully sent, triggering creation of new session "Quick Math Question Session" with URL showing /sessions/9bcb91e6-53eb-4618-9bf3-a10c2ee7b553

Step 6: Waited for agent response - Agent successfully responded with the answer "4" within 4 seconds (well within the 3-minute timeout), showing "Worked for 4s" indicator and agent status changed to "idle" after completion

Step 7: Verified response contains "4" - Agent response verified to be "4", which is the correct mathematical answer to 2+2. Screenshot captured showing the full conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
